perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a fur-trimmed knit jacket and a young man in a black puffer jacket stand outside a dark building; she looks at him while he gestures. (2) Non-live action clip: Animation of Jerry the mouse pulling a smaller grey mouse (Tuffy/Nibbles) by the hand while looking back. (3) The couple mimics the animated pose; the man pulls the woman's hand as they both lean and look back. (4) Non-live action clip: Jerry shows the smaller mouse a paper/map. (5) The couple walks towards the camera smiling while holding hands, transitioning out of the pose.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop music starts immediately with a rhythmic beat. No vocals are detected. (2) A subtle chime or transition sound effect occurs during the cut to animation. (3) The music continues at a consistent volume and pace throughout the video, providing a playful background for the demonstration.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Top center: "情侣合照小技巧" (Couple photo-taking tips). Tone is helpful and instructional. (2) Below top text: "🐹JERRY POSE🐭". Tone is playful and creative, acting as a hook for the specific posing style.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> Animated Reference -> Live-Action Demo -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character and 1 male main character demonstrated the pose throughout.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Woman: Brown knit jacket with faux-fur sleeves, light-colored shorts, dark knee-high boots. Man: Black puffer jacket, tan cable-knit sweater, dark trousers, grey sneakers, face obscured by a black heart emoji.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern building exterior with a dark, ridged facade. Pavement on the ground and some sparse decorative plants/trees in white planters in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a creative photography tutorial for couples, using nostalgic animation from 'Tom and Jerry' as a posing guide to create dynamic and cute social media photos.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Usage of iconic cartoon clips to bridge nostalgia with modern lifestyle content; man's face obscured by a heart sticker.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a split-screen or rapid-cut comparison technique common in lifestyle tutorials to link the inspiration source with the final outcome.
